testcase.name: Verify onboarding screens and navigate to login
testcase.classname: Login Functionality
testcase.system-out:
✅ Driver initialized successfully
Scenario: Verify onboarding screens and navigate to login # src/test/resources/features/CustomerLogin/01_Login.feature:5 Given the app is launched # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_app_is_launched() And Verify the "Digitization" screen is displayed # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.verify_the_screen_is_displayed(java.lang.String) When the user clicks on Next # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_user_clicks_on_next() Then Verify the "World of Machines" screen should be displayed # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.verify_the_screen_should_be_displayed(java.lang.String) When the user clicks on Next again # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_user_clicks_on_next_again() Then Verify the "Accelerating Growth" screen should displayed # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.verify_the_screen_should_displayed(java.lang.String) When the user clicks on Finish # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_user_clicks_on_finish() Then Verify the "Login to Your Account" screen should be visible # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.verify_the_screen_should_be_visible(java.lang.String) When the user double taps on the APMS AI footer if needed # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_user_double_taps_on_the_apms_ai_footer_if_needed() [AppHooks] On login screen — stopping

testcase.name: Verify user is able to login successfully
testcase.classname: Login Functionality
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify user is able to login successfully # src/test/resources/features/CustomerLogin/01_Login.feature:69 Given the user is on the login screen # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_user_is_on_the_login_screen() When the user enters email "anilkumar.m@apms.ai" # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_user_enters_email(java.lang.String) And the user enters password "1234" # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_user_enters_password(java.lang.String) And the user clicks on Login # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_user_clicks_on_login() Then Verify the user should be logged in successfully # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.verify_the_user_should_be_logged_in_successfully() [AppHooks] On Dashboard — stopping

testcase.system-out: @regression @smoke @machine-subscription @p1 @smoke @p1 Scenario: Search Product Setup Type and long press to open Action Menus bottom sheet # src/test/resources/features/CustomerLogin/Configurations/ProductSetupTypes/ProductSetupMachineSubscription.feature:20 When User clicks on profile icon # StepDefinitions.common.CommonNavigationSteps.userClicksOnProfileIcon() When User clicks on "Configurations" section # StepDefinitions.common.CommonNavigationSteps.userClicksOnSection(java.lang.String) When User clicks on "Product Setup Types" feature # StepDefinitions.common.CommonNavigationSteps.userClicksOnFeature(java.lang.String) And User has already created a Product Setup Type # StepDefinitions.configurations.productsetuptypes.ProductSetupTypeCreationSteps.userHasAlreadyCreatedAProductSetupType() When User clicks on search icon # StepDefinitions.common.CommonFormSteps.userClicksOnSearchIcon() And User taps on search input field # StepDefinitions.common.CommonFormSteps.userTapsOnSearchInputField() And User clears existing text in search field # StepDefinitions.common.CommonFormSteps.userClearsExistingTextInSearchField() And User enters newly created Product Setup Type Name # StepDefinitions.configurations.productsetuptypes.ProductSetupTypeCreationSteps.userEntersNewlyCreatedProductSetupTypeName() And User waits for search results to load # StepDefinitions.common.CommonFormSteps.userWaitsForSearchResultsToLoad() Then system should display matching Product Setup Type results # StepDefinitions.configurations.productsetuptypes.ProductSetupTypeCreationSteps.systemShouldDisplayMatchingProductSetupTypeResults() And User verifies Product Setup Type appears in list # StepDefinitions.configurations.productsetuptypes.ProductSetupTypeCreationSteps.userVerifiesProductSetupTypeAppearsInList() When User long presses on Product Setup Type record # StepDefinitions.configurations.productsetuptypes.ProductSetupTypeMachineSubscriptionSteps.userLongPressesOnProductSetupTypeRecord() Then Action Menus bottom sheet should be displayed # StepDefinitions.configurations.productsetuptypes.ProductSetupTypeMachineSubscriptionSteps.actionMenusBottomSheetShouldBeDisplayed() And Machine Subscription option should be visible in Action Menus # StepDefinitions.configurations.productsetuptypes.ProductSetupTypeMachineSubscriptionSteps.machineSubscriptionOptionShouldBeVisibleInActionMenus() When User closes Action Menus bottom sheet # StepDefinitions.common.CommonFormSteps.userClosesActionMenusBottomSheet() When User clicks search close X button # StepDefinitions.common.CommonFormSteps.userClicksSearchCloseXButton() Then search field should be closed # StepDefinitions.common.CommonFormSteps.searchFieldShouldBeClosed() And module list should be in normal state # StepDefinitions.common.CommonFormSteps.moduleListShouldBeInNormalState() And User should return to Product Setup Types list screen # StepDefinitions.configurations.productsetuptypes.ProductSetupTypeCreationSteps.userShouldReturnToProductSetupTypesListScreen() [AppHooks] On list screen (Search button visible)
